label: Capital Pak
blurb: Banking, Wealth Management & Fintech. Regulatory compliance and asset scaling.

skills.label: Chargeback Evidence Assembler
skills.method: Pulls AVS matches, shipping tracking, and customer communication logs into a single PDF to fight fraudulent credit card disputes.
trigger_examples: wins back thousands in stolen revenue for merchants

skills.label: Corporate Card Receipt Chaser
skills.method: Pings employees via Slack exactly 2 hours after a card swipe \>$75, demanding a photo of the receipt before they lose it.

skills.label: Kyc Aml Document Verifier
skills.method: Cross-references uploaded IDs against global PEP (Politically Exposed Persons) databases, checking for image manipulation/deepfakes.
trigger_examples: speeds up user onboarding while preventing federal fines

skills.label: Portfolio Rebalancing Trigger
skills.method: Monitors wealth accounts; if equity/bond splits drift \>5% from the target due to market movement, it auto-generates the required trades.

skills.label: Crypto Wallet Fifo Tax Calculator
skills.method: Traces 10,000 micro-transactions across Ethereum and Solana to calculate precise First-In-First-Out capital gains for the IRS.

skills.label: Mortgage Dti Calculator
skills.method: Extracts data from W2s, paystubs, and Plaid bank feeds to automatically calculate Debt-to-Income ratios for loan origination.
trigger_examples: replaces 5 hours of manual mortgage underwriting per file

skills.label: Merchant Cash Advance Underwriter
skills.method: Analyzes 6 months of Stripe/Square daily transaction volumes to calculate maximum safe lending limits and repayment terms.

skills.label: Wire Transfer Anomaly Blocker
skills.method: Flags outgoing wires that match CEO fraud patterns (e.g., sudden Friday afternoon requests to new offshore accounts).
trigger_examples: prevents irreversible multi-million dollar business email compromise losses

skills.label: Municipal Bond Prospectus Parser
skills.method: Reads 300-page bond offerings, extracting call dates, yields, and municipal tax risks into a clean database.
trigger_examples: allows fixed-income traders to act faster
